about.title: About Me.
about.p1: I’m a UI/UX designer with a strong foundation in front-end development and experience leading website projects.
about.p2: Currently working as a Website Project Manager at MavenPro Solutions, I collaborate with designers, developers, and stakeholders to deliver high-quality web experiences.
about.p3: My goal is to design clean, intuitive, and accessible interfaces while bridging the gap between design and development.

experience.title: Website Project Manager
experience.description:
Managing website projects from planning to launch, coordinating between designers, developers, and clients to ensure smooth project delivery.
Along with project management, I also contribute to website design, creating user-focused layouts and ensuring the final product aligns with usability and visual design standards.

experience.title: UI/UX Intern
experience.description: Independently designed and developed the WordPress website www.logotak.in, creating wireframes, user flows, and intuitive UI while managing end-to-end development from concept to launch.

experience.title: Analyst
experience.description: Assisted in designing interactive UI prototypes, conducted user testing, and provided feedback to improve overall user experience.

portfolio.title: Art Gallery
portfolio.description: Built a creative digital art-sharing platform with user authentication and real-time collaboration.

portfolio.title: Divine Gym
portfolio.description: Developed a fitness management application with interactive workout tracking and diet planning.

portfolio.title: Logotak
portfolio.description: Created a Digital marketing agency website using WordPress.

contact.title: Get in Touch.
contact.heading: Let’s build something meaningful together.
contact.description: If you’re looking for someone who can design and build user-focused digital experiences, feel free to reach out.
